product: Pipeline update timeline table is now available (Public Preview)
tagline: The system.lakeflow.pipeline update timeline table provides complete historical tracking of pipeline updates and supports fine grained analysis of update activity, triggers, results, and compute…
what_it_does: The system.lakeflow.pipeline update timeline table provides complete historical tracking of pipeline updates and supports fine grained analysis of update activity, triggers, results, and compute usage. note The lakeflow schema was previously known as workflow. The content of both schemas is identical.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: Be both a metastore admin
capabilities.desc: Be both a metastore admin and an account admin, or

capabilities.title: Have USE and SELECT permissions
capabilities.desc: Have USE and SELECT permissions on the system schemas. See Grant access to system tables.

key_takeaway: The system.lakeflow.pipeline update timeline table provides complete historical tracking of pipeline updates and supports fine grained analysis of update activity, triggers, results, and compute…
